message:
refactor(cli): use OutputContext consistently for JSON mode detection

Update several CLI commands to use the passed OutputContext's is_json()
method instead of the separate `json` boolean parameter. This improves
consistency and reduces parameter shadowing across the codebase.

Changes:
- orphans.rs: Use ctx.is_json() instead of json parameter
- ready.rs: Rename _ctx to outer_ctx, use outer_ctx.is_json()
- search.rs: Rename _ctx to outer_ctx, use outer_ctx.is_json()
- show.rs: Rename _ctx to outer_ctx, use outer_ctx.is_json()

This aligns with the OutputContext pattern established elsewhere in the
CLI where the context object is the single source of truth for output
mode configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
